welcome.subject: Welcome to {{merchantName}} Loyalty Program!
welcome.body:
Hi {{memberName}},

You're now a member of the {{merchantName}} loyalty program with {{points}} points to start.

Download your pass: {{passUrl}}

Start earning rewards today!
welcome.pointsInfo: You currently have {{points}} points in your account.
welcome.footer: Start earning points on every purchase!

rewardEarned.subject: You've earned a reward!

pointsEarned.subject: You earned {{points}} points!
pointsEarned.body:
Great news, {{memberName}}!

You just earned {{points}} points at {{merchantName}}.

Current balance: {{balance}} points
Keep earning to unlock rewards!

rewardExpiring.subject: Your reward expires soon
rewardExpiring.body:
Hi {{memberName}},

Your reward '{{rewardName}}' will expire on {{expiryDate}}.

Don't forget to use it before it's gone!
rewardExpiring.footer: Visit {{merchantName}} to use your reward before it expires.

birthday.subject: Happy Birthday from {{merchantName}}!
birthday.body:
Happy Birthday, {{memberName}}!

Enjoy {{bonusPoints}} bonus points as our gift to you.

Current balance: {{balance}} points
Have a wonderful birthday!

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.body:
Hi {{memberName}},

Click the link below to reset your password:
{{resetUrl}}

This link will expire in 24 hours.

If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
passwordReset.ignoreNote: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

rewardRedeemed.subject: Reward Redeemed: {{rewardName}}
rewardRedeemed.instructions: Show this email at checkout to claim your reward.

tierUpgrade.subject: Congratulations! You've reached {{tierName}} status!
tierUpgrade.body: You've been upgraded to {{tierName}} status at {{merchantName}}!

birthdayReward.subject: Happy Birthday from {{merchantName}}!
birthdayReward.body: We hope you have a wonderful day! Here's a special gift just for you.

inactivityReminder.subject: We miss you at {{merchantName}}!
inactivityReminder.body: It's been a while since your last visit. We'd love to see you again!
inactivityReminder.pointsReminder: You have {{points}} points waiting to be used.
inactivityReminder.footer: Your points are valuable – don't let them go to waste!

emailVerification.subject: Verify your email address
emailVerification.body: Please verify your email address to complete your registration.

welcome_new_user.subject: Welcome to LoyaltyDog
welcome_new_user.welcome_message: Welcome to LoyaltyDog — we're genuinely excited you're here.
welcome_new_user.acknowledgment: We know that your plate is full, your time is short, and that you've got a million things going on, so we'll keep this simple.
welcome_new_user.setup_call_message: Book a setup session with me. I'll help you get started quickly.
welcome_new_user.setup_call_button: Book A Set Up Call with Me
welcome_new_user.dashboard_access: You can now log in and start exploring your dashboard:
welcome_new_user.alternative_access: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
welcome_new_user.password_recommendation: (We recommend that you change your password)
welcome_new_user.quick_start_heading: Here are three things that you can do today! (approx. 20 minutes)
welcome_new_user.quick_start_step_1_details: Head to the Program Tab > Configure section and make sure your business details are correct.
welcome_new_user.quick_start_step_2_details: Go to Program Tab > Customise, you can update the colours and logo for your loyalty pass.
welcome_new_user.quick_start_step_3_details: Go to the Offers tab, hit the green "+" button, and create your first Offer. Keep it simple to start.
welcome_new_user.launch_ready_heading: You are now ready to launch!
welcome_new_user.launch_tip_1: Train your staff, print signage, and tell every customer.
welcome_new_user.launch_tip_2: The easier it is to join, the faster you'll see results.
welcome_new_user.youtube_channel_heading: Visit our YouTube Channel for more help videos:
welcome_new_user.closing_message: I'm really looking forward to seeing your program go live and helping you turn casual customers into loyal regulars.

welcome_new_user_verify.subject: Welcome to LoyaltyDog
welcome_new_user_verify.welcome_message: Welcome to LoyaltyDog — we're genuinely excited you're here.
welcome_new_user_verify.acknowledgment: We know that your plate is full, your time is short, and that you've got a million things going on, so we'll keep this simple.
welcome_new_user_verify.setup_call_message: Book a setup session with me. I'll help you get started quickly.
welcome_new_user_verify.setup_call_button: Book A Set Up Call with Me
welcome_new_user_verify.dashboard_access: You can now log in and start exploring your dashboard:
welcome_new_user_verify.alternative_access: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:

password_reset_wordpress.subject: WordPress Store Integration Complete - Set Your Password
password_reset_wordpress.welcome_message: Welcome to LoyaltyDog! Your WordPress store has been successfully integrated with our loyalty program platform.
password_reset_wordpress.instructions: To complete your setup and access your loyalty program dashboard, please set your password by clicking the link below:
password_reset_wordpress.alternative_access: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste this URL into your browser:
password_reset_wordpress.expiration_notice: Important: This password reset link will expire in {{ expires_in_hours }} hours. After that, please contact support to request a new one.
password_reset_wordpress.dashboard_access: Once you've set your password, you can log in to your dashboard here:

password_reset.subject: Reset Your Password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your LoyaltyDog account. If you made this request, you can set a new password by clicking the link below:
password_reset.alternative_access: If the button above doesn't work, you can also copy and paste this URL into your browser:
password_reset.no_action_needed: If you didn't request a password reset, no worries — you can safely ignore this email. Your current password will remain unchanged.

email_verification.subject: Email Verification Code
email_verification.instruction: To verify your email address, please use the one-time password (OTP) below:
email_verification.expiration_notice: This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you didn't request this verification, you can safely ignore this email.
email_verification.help_contact: Reach out to our support team at support@loyalty.dog or visit loyalty.dog/contact.
email_verification.closing_message: Thanks for choosing LoyaltyDog — we're thrilled to have you with us!

voucher_received.subject: You've received a special voucher!
voucher_received.voucher_heading: 🎁 You've received a special voucher from {{ programName }}!
voucher_received.voucher_intro: We're excited to share this exclusive offer with you. Use the voucher below on your next purchase and enjoy extra savings!
voucher_received.redemption_step_1: Click the link below to download your digital pass.
voucher_received.redemption_step_2: Follow the instructions to add it to your phone's wallet (Apple Wallet or Google Wallet).
voucher_received.redemption_step_3: Show your pass at checkout to redeem your voucher.
voucher_received.voucher_restriction: Note: This voucher is valid for in-store use only.
voucher_received.help_contact: If you need help redeeming your voucher or installing the pass? Contact us anytime at {{ programEmail }}.

welcome_voucher.subject: Welcome to {{ programName }}! Your Welcome Voucher is Ready
welcome_voucher.welcome_message: Welcome aboard! To thank you for joining us, we've prepared a special gift just for you:
welcome_voucher.voucher_intro: You can now download your digital voucher pass and start enjoying exclusive savings, loyalty rewards, and more.
welcome_voucher.redemption_step_1: Click the link below to download your digital pass.
welcome_voucher.redemption_step_2: Follow the instructions to add it to your phone's wallet (Apple Wallet or Google Wallet).
welcome_voucher.redemption_step_3: Show your pass at checkout to redeem your welcome voucher.
welcome_voucher.voucher_restriction: Note: This voucher is valid for in-store use only.
welcome_voucher.help_contact: If you need help redeeming your voucher or installing the pass? Contact us anytime at {{ programEmail }}.
welcome_voucher.closing_message: Thanks again for joining {{ programName }} — we're excited to have you with us!

birthday_voucher.subject: Happy Birthday from {{ programName }}!
birthday_voucher.birthday_wish: 🎉 Happy Birthday from all of us at {{ programName }}!
birthday_voucher.birthday_message: We hope your day is filled with joy, laughter, and wonderful memories.
birthday_voucher.gift_intro: To make your celebration even more special, we've prepared a little gift for you:
birthday_voucher.gift_message: This exclusive birthday reward is our way of saying thank you for being part of our community.
birthday_voucher.redemption_step_1: Click the link below to download your digital pass.
birthday_voucher.redemption_step_2: Follow the instructions to add it to your phone's wallet (Apple Wallet or Google Wallet).
birthday_voucher.redemption_step_3: Show your pass at checkout to redeem your birthday voucher.
birthday_voucher.voucher_restriction: Note: This voucher is valid for in-store use only.
birthday_voucher.help_contact: If you need help redeeming your voucher or installing the pass? Contact us anytime at {{ programEmail }}.
birthday_voucher.birthday_wishes: Wishing you a fantastic birthday and a wonderful year ahead 🎂

digital_pass_ready.subject: Your Digital Store Card is Ready!
digital_pass_ready.good_news: Great news — your digital store card is ready to download!
digital_pass_ready.benefits_intro: With your new store card, you'll unlock exclusive perks like discounts, promotions, and loyalty points — all conveniently stored on your phone.
digital_pass_ready.download_step: Download: Click the link below to download your Pass Wallet file.
digital_pass_ready.install_step: Install: Follow the simple instructions to add it to your mobile wallet.
digital_pass_ready.help_message: If you have any questions or need help installing your card, our support team is here to help. Just reply to this email or contact us through our support page.
digital_pass_ready.thank_you: Thank you for being a valued customer — we hope you enjoy your new store card and all the benefits it brings!

transaction_summary.subject: {{ provider }} Transactions Summary
transaction_summary.message_1: {{ provider }} Transactions Summary for all Programs
transaction_summary.message_2: You can download the report from the below link

wordpress_email_failure_alert.alert_summary: A password reset email failed to send to a WordPress integration account. Manual intervention may be required.
wordpress_email_failure_alert.action_view_account: View Account: Review this account in admin dashboard
wordpress_email_failure_alert.action_resend_email: Resend Email: Use the "Resend Password Reset" function to retry delivery
wordpress_email_failure_alert.action_contact_merchant: Contact Merchant: If email continues to fail, contact merchant at {{ user_email }} to provide alternative setup instructions
wordpress_email_failure_alert.action_check_email_config: Check Email Config: Verify mail server configuration if multiple accounts are failing
wordpress_email_failure_alert.footer_message: This is an automated alert from LoyaltyDog. Please do not reply to this email.

shopify_install_customer.subject: Thank you for installing LoyaltyDog to your Shopify store
shopify_install_customer.welcome_message: Thank you for installing LoyaltyDog to your Shopify store.
shopify_install_customer.intro_message: We look forward to working with you on this exciting project.
shopify_install_customer.goal_message: Our goal is to make this as easy as possible for you.
shopify_install_customer.setup_message: We are now working on setting up your LoyaltyDog Account. We will contact you as soon as your account is set up and ready to go. Please bear with us, if you do not hear from us in the next 24 hours please contact me.
shopify_install_customer.video_call_message: We will also set up a short video call to give you an interactive tour of the LoyaltyDog Platform that will answer a number of questions that we know you will want the answers to.
shopify_install_customer.question_1: How do I get my customers to Join the program?
shopify_install_customer.question_2: How do I use LoyaltyDog with my Shopify terminal and navigate the Management Portal?
shopify_install_customer.question_3: How do I set up the Loyalty Pass with my Branding?
shopify_install_customer.question_4: How do I set up the Loyalty Rewards?
shopify_install_customer.looking_forward: I look forward to meeting you soon and please remember that we are available to answer any questions that you may have about implementing and launching a Loyalty Program.

eposnow_install_customer.subject: Thank you for installing LoyaltyDog to your EPOS Now POS
eposnow_install_customer.welcome_message: Thank you for installing LoyaltyDog to your EPOS Now POS.
eposnow_install_customer.intro_message: We look forward to working with you on this exciting project.
eposnow_install_customer.goal_message: Our goal is to make this as easy as possible for you.
eposnow_install_customer.setup_message: We are now working on setting up your LoyaltyDog Account. We will contact you as soon as your account is set up and ready to go. Please bear with us, if you do not hear from us in the next 24 hours please contact me.
eposnow_install_customer.video_call_message: We will also set up a short video call to give you an interactive tour of the LoyaltyDog Platform that will answer a number of questions that we know you will want the answers to.
eposnow_install_customer.question_1: How do I get my customers to Join the program?
eposnow_install_customer.question_2: How do I use LoyaltyDog with my EPOS Now terminal and navigate the Management Portal?
eposnow_install_customer.question_3: How do I set up the Loyalty Pass with my Branding?
eposnow_install_customer.question_4: How do I set up the Loyalty Rewards?
eposnow_install_customer.looking_forward: I look forward to meeting you soon and please remember that we are available to answer any questions that you may have about implementing and launching a Loyalty Program.

shopify_data_request_customer.subject: Data Request from {{ shop.name }}
shopify_data_request_customer.message_1: A customer requests their data from {{ shop.name }} ({{ shop.domain }})

eposnow_data_request_customer.subject: Data Request from {{ shop.name }}
eposnow_data_request_customer.message_1: A customer requests their data from {{ shop.name }} ({{ shop.domain }})

giftCardPurchased.subject: Your Gift Card is Ready — {{currency}}{{amount}}
giftCardPurchased.body: {{senderName}} has sent you a {{currency}}{{amount}} gift card.
giftCardPurchased.footer: Use this card at any participating {{merchantName}} location.

giftCardExpiringSoon.subject: Your Gift Card Expires Soon
giftCardExpiringSoon.body: Your gift card ending in {{lastFour}} will expire on {{expiryDate}}.
giftCardExpiringSoon.footer: Don't let your balance go to waste — use it before {{expiryDate}}.

giftCardSoldReceipt.subject: Gift Card Sale — {{currency}}{{amount}}
giftCardSoldReceipt.body: A gift card has been successfully created.
giftCardSoldReceipt.footer: This is an automated receipt from LoyaltyDog.

giftCardReloadReceipt.subject: Gift Card Topped Up — {{currency}}{{amount}} Added
giftCardReloadReceipt.body: {{currency}}{{amount}} has been added to your gift card ending in {{lastFour}}.

merchant_monthly_summary.subject: Your Monthly Loyalty Program Summary — {{month}} {{year}}
merchant_monthly_summary.body: Here's your loyalty program performance summary for {{month}} {{year}}.
merchant_monthly_summary.footer: Keep up the great work engaging your customers!

integration_sync_failure.subject: ⚠️ Integration Sync Failed — {{integrationName}}
integration_sync_failure.body: We encountered an error while syncing with {{integrationName}}.
integration_sync_failure.troubleshooting: Please check your integration settings or contact support.
integration_sync_failure.footer: We'll retry the sync automatically in {{retryInterval}} minutes.

low_gift_card_balance.subject: Low Gift Card Balance Alert — {{currency}}{{balance}} remaining
low_gift_card_balance.body: Your gift card inventory balance is running low.
low_gift_card_balance.recommendation: Consider topping up your balance to avoid disappointing customers.
low_gift_card_balance.footer: This alert was triggered when your balance fell below {{currency}}{{threshold}}.

tier_downgrade.subject: Your tier status will change soon
tier_downgrade.body: We wanted to let you know that your tier status will change on {{effectiveDate}}.
tier_downgrade.reason: Your activity has been below the {{currentTier}} requirement for {{inactiveDays}} days.
tier_downgrade.howToMaintain: Earn {{pointsRequired}} more points by {{deadline}} to maintain your {{currentTier}} status.
tier_downgrade.footer: Thank you for being a loyal member of {{merchantName}}.

referral_earned.subject: You earned a referral bonus! 🎉
referral_earned.body: Great news! Your friend {{referredFriendName}} just joined using your referral.
referral_earned.footer: Keep sharing the love and earning rewards at {{merchantName}}!

account_suspended.subject: Your account has been suspended
account_suspended.body: Your {{merchantName}} loyalty account has been suspended.
account_suspended.contactSupport: If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team.
account_suspended.canAppeal: You can appeal this suspension by providing additional information.
account_suspended.footer: We value your membership and want to resolve this quickly.

payment_failed.subject: Payment Failed — Action Required
payment_failed.body: We were unable to process your payment of {{amount}} for {{description}}.
payment_failed.updatePayment: Please update your payment information to avoid service interruption.
payment_failed.footer: If you believe this is an error, contact support at {{supportEmail}}.

subscription_renewing.subject: Your subscription renews on {{renewalDate}}
subscription_renewing.body: This is a reminder that your subscription will renew automatically on {{renewalDate}}.
subscription_renewing.cancelOption: If you wish to cancel, do so before the renewal date.
subscription_renewing.footer: Thank you for your continued subscription!

merchant_welcome.subject: Welcome to LoyaltyDog — Let's Get Started!
merchant_welcome.body: Welcome to LoyaltyDog! Your account is ready and we're excited to help you build a successful loyalty program.
merchant_welcome.step2: 2. Create attractive rewards for your customers
merchant_welcome.step3: 3. Integrate with your POS or e-commerce platform
merchant_welcome.support: Need help? Check our guides or contact support.

api_rate_limit_warning.subject: ⚠️ API Rate Limit Warning — {{percentage}}% Used
api_rate_limit_warning.body: Your application is approaching the API rate limit.
api_rate_limit_warning.recommendation: Consider implementing request throttling or caching to reduce API calls.
api_rate_limit_warning.upgradeOption: For higher limits, consider upgrading your plan.
api_rate_limit_warning.footer: This is an automated warning to prevent service interruption.
